aliases: Pro-VS 12 MP Ultra-HD Infrared Fisheye IP Camera
features: 360 degree panoramic fisheye with multiple dewarping/decoding modes
release_notes: Pro-VS is a separate LTS product line from Platinum and Pro-X. LTS explicitly lists Pro-VS (alongside Pro-X) on its official NDAA-Compliant Products page, making it a relevant option for government/school/E-Rate-funded installs where NDAA Section 889 compliance matters. Underlying OEM/chipset origin not confirmed in sources reviewed.

frigate.notes: RTSP path and ONVIF profile not confirmed for the Pro-VS line specifically. Fisheye dewarping for Frigate typically needs to happen either on-camera (check for a 'panoramic'/'dewarp' mode in the web UI) or via Frigate's own camera-side transform — verify which modes this camera exposes over RTSP before assuming a specific dewarped stream is available.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF support not independently confirmed for this specific model.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
